text_lines: Principal Recruiter | Empowering Capital One’s Next Generation of Tech Leadership

Ready to build the future of fintech? 🚀 Capital One is #hiring a Principal Fullstack Engineer in Bangalore! We aren’t just a bank; we’re a tech company disruptor. Why us? Modern Stack: Lead with Go, Java, TypeScript, and AWS. Tech First: Drive architectural decisions and mentor elite pods. Scale: Build resilient, high-concurrency systems for millions. Join a culture that values engineering excellence and bold innovation. Apply now & complete the coding challenge to get in touch. Goodluck! #Capit
Principal Associate - Software Engineering (Verified job) Principal Associate - Software Engineering
MBA Graduate | Recruiter and Operations at Talganize Private Limited

Position: Go backend engineer. Location: Hyderabad (Hybrid). Exp: 8+ yrs. Employment Type: Full-Time. Please share your resumes at jason@talganize.com Please check jd: We’re looking for a strong Golang Backend Engineer to build a high-performance, developer-first Email API platform. This is a core backend role focused on scalability, reliability, and system design—not UI or low-code work. 🔹 Work on APIs, email pipelines, queues & distributed systems. 🔹 Tech: Go, Kafka/RabbitMQ, PostgreSQL/MySQL.
IT Recruiter at Talganize Private Limited(Mars Consulting)

Position: Go backend engineer LOCATION: Hyderabad(Hybrid) Exp: 8+ yrs Employment Type: Full-Time Please share your resumes at sravanthi@talganize.com Please check jd: We’re looking for a strong Golang Backend Engineer to build a high-performance, developer-first Email API platform. This is a core backend role focused on scalability, reliability, and system design—not UI or low-code work. 🔹 Work on APIs, email pipelines, queues & distributed systems 🔹 Tech: Go, Kafka/RabbitMQ, PostgreSQL/MySQL 🔹

With over 40 years of experience and tens of thousands of customers across high-tech, medical, machine design, energy, and other industries, collaboration and partnership remain at the heart of everything we do. GoEngineer is a leading value-added reseller and provider of engineering solutions, specializing in software, hardware, and services that support product design and manufacturing. With over 40 years of experience and tens of thousands of customers across high-tech, medical, machine design, energy, and other industries, collaboration and partnership remain at the heart of everything we do. GoEngineer provides best-in-class technology from SOLIDWORKS, Dassault Systèmes, Stratasys, CAMWorks, Bright Laser Technologies, Driveworks, Formlabs, Creaform, Artec 3D, Cadence, and more. We empower the creation of today’s products and tomorrow’s innovations and proudly support educational communities as a national and global leader for colleges, universities, and schools.
